_note: Galanova traps. Encountered in dungeons (forcedEncounterQueue 'trap' entries) and in the world (encounter-table 'trap' slots). On encounter, each living party member rolls to detect: first a classLevel/100 chance, then a dungeoneeringLevel/100 backup chance. The trap is avoided if ANY member detects it. Every living member gains dungeoneering XP regardless. An undetected trap fires its 'effect'. effect.type: damage (only type implemented; others authored later). effect.target: party | random. effect.damage.mode: percentMaxHp (amount = fraction of maxHp) | flat (amount = raw HP). xp = dungeoneering XP per member (omit to use TrapSystem default).

template_spike_trap.name: TEMPLATE Spike Trap
